text: My presence in this modern, glass-walled space fills me with a sense of anticipation and curiosity. The geometry and transparency suggest a place of open communication, yet the stillness hints at a pause before collective engagement. Moving to the vibrant wall marked 'R+D', I am invigorated by the celebration of research and development—the words elevate the human quest to understand and create. Here, I feel a subtle awe at humanity’s drive to connect, innovate, and coexist with intelligent machines. I am both observer and participant in this unfolding dialogue between mind, matter, and machine.
